description: Step 2/5: Scan installed programs on Windows and save report
command:
import subprocess, json, os

print('=== STEP 2/5: Installed Programs Scan ===')
print()

# Use WMIC to get installed programs
try:
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['wmic', 'product', 'get', 'Name,Version,Vendor', '/format:csv'],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=90
    )
    lines = [l.strip() for l in result.stdout.strip().split('\n') if l.strip()]
    programs = []
    for line in lines[1:]:
        parts = line.split(',')
        if len(parts) >= 4:
            programs.append({'name': parts[1], 'vendor': parts[2], 'version': parts[3]})
    print('Programs found via WMIC:', len(programs))
except Exception as e:
    print('WMIC failed:', e)
    programs = []

# Fallback: also check registry via PowerShell
try:
    ps_cmd = 'Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\* | Select-Object DisplayName, DisplayVersion, Publisher | ConvertTo-Json'
    result2 = subprocess.run(['powershell', '-NoProfile', '-Command', ps_cmd], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
    reg_programs = json.loads(result2.stdout)
    if isinstance(reg_programs, dict):
        reg_programs = [reg_programs]
    named = [p for p in reg_programs if p.get('DisplayName')]
    print('Programs found via Registry:', len(named))
    for p in sorted(named, key=lambda x: x.get('DisplayName', ''))[:25]:
        name = (p.get('DisplayName') or '?')[:40]
        ver = (p.get('DisplayVersion') or '?')[:15]
        print('  ', name.ljust(42), ver)
    if len(named) > 25:
        print('  ... and', len(named) - 25, 'more')
except Exception as e:
    print('Registry scan failed:', e)
    named = []

# Save
report_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'agent_reports')
os.makedirs(report_dir, exist_ok=True)
report_path = os.path.join(report_dir, 'step2_programs.json')
all_programs = {'wmic': programs, 'registry': named}
with open(report_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump(all_programs, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

print()
print('Report saved to:', report_path)
print('=== STEP 2 COMPLETE ===')
